name: Deltamac(Taiwan) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Deltamac(Taiwan) Co.,Ltd. produces, distributes, and franchises audio and video products in Taiwan. The company engages in production, recording, publication, rental, distribution, and export/import of TV and film program DVD, BD and 4K UHD discs, and music CDs. It is also involved in the agency and sale of physical and digital copyrights of movies; operation of TSUTAYA bookstores and Wired Tokyo caf√É¬©s; and provision of catering services. In addition, the company sells stationery products and delicatessen. Deltamac(Taiwan) Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
